title: Ars Nouveau Brass-ified Create-Style - ANBICS
description: Changes Ars Nouveau blocks, items and armors with Gold trim into a Brass trimmed variant to match Create mod's Brass

# Ars Nouveau Brass-ified Create-Style - ANBICS
# 
![--Image After--](https://i.imgur.com/lCOMr7s.png)

**Changes Ars Nouveau blocks, items and armors with Gold trim into a Brass trimmed variant to match Create mod's Brass**

-  for  - 1.19.2  -  1.20.1  -  1.20.2 - 1.21.* -
